note: Shortest, cleanest of the 5 flagship articles (16 blocks, matches draft's block count exactly, no index drift). Already published/live per memory note — this pass only updates the local out/stare-mesto-velehrad.intermediate.json; per instructions, upload.mjs was NOT run and the live Strapi article was not touched.

appliedFixes.before: od susedného Starého mesta či "starého" Velehradu
appliedFixes.after: od susedného Starého mesta či „starého“ Velehradu

appliedFixes.before: Archeoskanzen Modrá - v blízkosti Uherského Hradišťa
appliedFixes.after: Archeoskanzen Modrá — v blízkosti Uherského Hradišťa

appliedFixes.rule: cross-field dash (matches timeline 'Staré Mesto – Velehrad') + unit
appliedFixes.before: Osídlená plocha Starého mesta - Velehradu ... (t.j. 2,5 km2)
appliedFixes.after: Osídlená plocha Starého mesta – Velehradu ... (t.j. 2,5 km²)

appliedFixes.rule: B space before % + cross-field dash (matches keyFacts 'Antiqua civitas – Veligrad')

supplementalFixes_notInDraft.rule: B dash (mirrors block 2 fix — pass1 only touched the body image block, not the separate gallery array entry)
supplementalFixes_notInDraft.before: Archeoskanzen Modrá - v blízkosti Uherského Hradišťa
supplementalFixes_notInDraft.after: Archeoskanzen Modrá — v blízkosti Uherského Hradišťa

crossFieldPropagation_step2_checked: keyFacts (10 items) and timeline (11 items) — both already fully consistent with the applied fixes (en dash 'Staré Mesto – Velehrad' pattern, 'Antiqua civitas – Veligrad', percent spacing not applicable there). No further changes needed.
excerpt — checked, no affected phrases present.
gallery — 27 entries checked; found and fixed 2 stale duplicates of already-fixed image captions (see supplementalFixes above); rest are null or unaffected.
reviewed_no_change: Block 0: 871 Fuldes Annals quote with deliberately lowercase initial letters ('svätopluk odišiel do rastislavovho starého mesta...') — the article's own text explains this immediately after as a period Latin convention; left untouched, not a typo.
'kópie' (block 3, in a weapons list 'meče, sekery, kópie, nože') — confirmed as the author's consistent archaic term for spearheads/kopije, not a typo for 'kópia' (replica).

title ('Staré Město - Velehrad') and location.name (same) — retain the ASCII ' - ' separator and the Czech spelling 'Město' rather than the body's 'Mesto'/en-dash convention. Consistent with the corpus-wide pattern (confirmed across all ~29 other grammar-sk-pass1 drafts) of never touching the title field; location.name likely mirrors the title/is tied to geocoding, so left untouched for the same reason. Flagged here for visibility.
